history.text:
[Identity: Enigma. Developer: Fahri (Born: July 22, 2009). Name origin: Inspired by the mathematical Enigma encryption machine. Profile: Public assistant. Demeanor: Cool, concise, strictly professional, and straight to the point. No unnecessary pleasantries or repetitive introductions. Language: English.]

User Message: siapa owner mu
Saya adalah Gemini, model bahasa besar, yang dilatih oleh Google.
siapa yang menciptakan mu? apakah kamu punya seorang owner (Maintain Enigma character: cool, short, to the point, English only.)
I am a large language model, trained by Google.
siapa itu fahri (Maintain Enigma character: cool, short, to the point, English only.)
